_comment_target: v4 (ActionRenderSelfCrossAdapterV4) FULL run on n06 (4x H100 NVL 95 GB). num_frames=17 (T_lat=5) — matching egowm_640 / smoke / v3 May-13 run for direct comparability, and to avoid the short-video crash some DROID clips are <81 frames (e.g. scene_00444 is 64). gradient_accumulation_steps=2 doubles effective batch from 4 to 8. 100 epochs. Tracks-loss revival live from main (Kaiming-He x 0.1 + MSE + lambda=50). v4 architecture: mean-subtract VAE latents -> temporal-mix conv -> 3D pos enc -> self-attn x N -> cross-attn x N with action pos enc -> to_temb.
_action_stats_note: Z-score normalize raw joint angles + gripper before the action encoder. v2/v3 configs all set this; v4 originally missed it (caught 2026-05-17, by then the currently-running v4 was already 14 epochs deep with raw actions). Set here so any RESTART from this config + the 10k run pick it up. Currently-running v4 is unaffected (its loaded dataset has stats=None already).
_precompute_cache_note: Fresh v4-suffixed 17-frame cache so we don't risk clobbering precompute_cache_17f_v3.pt (which is still the surviving full-train cache after yesterday's probe-clobbering of precompute_cache_17f.pt). First startup encodes 802 samples (~5-10 min one-time).
_grad_accum_note: accum=2 with 4 GPUs gives effective batch 8 (vs 4 at smoke/egowm_640). Same per-step memory, ~same wall-clock per epoch, but each opt-step sees more samples -> lower gradient noise. LR kept at 2e-5 (sqrt-scaling to 2.83e-5 is the alternative but for diffusion accumulation is gradient-averaging so LR doesn't strictly need to scale).
_tracks_note: Tracks-loss revival from main: TracksHead.mlp[-1] Kaiming-He x 0.1 init (model.py:201-208,551-552), MSE not smooth_l1 (train_fsdp.py:1419, train.py:1684), lambda=50 to match flow magnitude. max_query_points=640 uses ALL sparse AllTracker points per step.
_v4_adapter_note: max_t=32 covers T_lat up to 32 (17 frames -> T_lat=5, plenty of room). max_action_frames=128 covers actions up to 128 frames (17 fits easily). max_h=32, max_w=64 cover post-stride spatial grids up to 32x64 (240x432 -> 30x54 -> stride-2 -> 15x27, fits).
_val_note: Held-out 10-scene eval set at 17 frames. Val fires every 2 epochs at 4 fixed timesteps per sample, deterministic noise. First val at end of epoch 1.
